content:
The user wants me to compose an email to alice@example.com. I'm currently on Gmail's inbox page. I need to:

1. Click the "Compose" button to open a new email window
2. Fill in the recipient field with alice@example.com
3. The user didn't specify a subject or body, so I should probably ask about those or just leave them blank

Let me start by reading the current page to see what's available.[
